name: @metorial/gagelist
description: Manage gages (measurement equipment), calibration records, and compliance tracking for quality standards such as ISO 9001, ISO 17025, AS 9100, and 21 CFR Parts 11/820. Create, read, update, and delete gage records and calibration records. Upload and manage file attachments on gages and calibrations. Generate calibration certificates. Manage manufacturer entries. Read and update custom field values for organization-specific data. Retrieve and update account settings. Export data for business intelligence and reporting purposes.
